text:
Monthly values for the first of up to 10 waiver IDs in the month. There are separate variables for each 
of the 12 months during the year. The last two digits of this variable indicate the month. 

SHORT NAME: WVR_ID_01_01 
WVR_ID_01_02 
WVR_ID_01_03

WVR_ID_01_06 
 WVR_ID_01_07

WVR_ID_01_09 
WVR_ID_01_10 
WVR_ID_01_11 
WVR_ID_01_12
